title: Home row: short sentences
text: a sad lad asks dad; a lass falls; dads ask lads;

tips.text: Semicolons live on home row too — pinky right
Don't break flow at the spaces

tips.target: a lass falls; dads ask lads;

character_tips.anna: Sentences without leaving home row. Notice how little your hands move?
character_tips.maxim: Efficiency starts with minimal movement. Every keystroke earned.
character_tips.klavochka: A little story from home row, my sunshine ☀️
